message:
Add RNG policy metadata validation, BitGenerator spawn, and structured replay logging

fnp-random core additions:
- Add SeedMaterial variants: SeedSequence, BitGenerator, Generator,
  RandomState for richer seed material modeling
- Add RandomPolicyError enum with fail-closed unknown metadata
  rejection (reason code: rng_policy_unknown_metadata)
- Add validate_rng_policy_metadata() public API for checking
  mode/class metadata strings against known-compatible values
- Add BitGenerator::spawn() for packet-007 compliant child generator
  creation with bounded child count enforcement
- Add SeedSequence::generate_state_u64() for producing 64-bit state
  words by combining pairs of 32-bit words
- Add BitGeneratorError::SpawnContractViolation variant
- Add algorithm-specific state schema validation to BitGeneratorState
  (mt19937_index, pcg64_stream, philox_key, sfc64_carry) with
  per-algorithm deterministic computation from seed+counter
- Add RandomLogRecord and RandomRuntimeMode structs for structured
  RNG replay logging with is_replay_complete() validation
- Rename internal functions: default_rng -> deterministic_rng_from_seed_material,
  generator_from_seed_sequence -> rng_from_seed_sequence

fnp-conformance integration:
- Wire policy_metadata operation into RNG differential suite
- Wire policy_metadata_unknown operation into RNG adversarial suite
- Add mode_raw/class_raw fields to RNG differential and adversarial
  fixture case structs
- Add structured RNG companion log emission (maybe_append_rng_workflow_log)
  during workflow scenario rng_fixture_case steps with replay-complete
  validation as a pass requirement
- Add derive_rng_companion_log_path() to workflow scenario gate for
  generating _rng.jsonl companion log paths alongside workflow logs
- Include RNG companion logs in packet-007 forensics artifact index
  when present
- Update oracle report total_cases 13 -> 14 for new policy_metadata case

Test fixtures:
- Add rng_policy_metadata_known_contract to rng_differential_cases.json
- Add rng_policy_metadata_unknown_guardrail to rng_adversarial_cases.json
- Add corresponding workflow scenario steps to workflow_scenario_corpus.json
  in both happy-path and adversarial scenario definitions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 }
